Rewrite the existing content, which is basically what we're asking it to do
We know that if they're in the position 11 position 12
For a query and they don't have that exact match keyword in the content by simply adding that exact match keyword
We can typically improve the rank position by a couple of spots
And remember a couple of spots is huge if you're in position 10 11 12
That's enough to get it to the first page. So that's all we're doing at this first pass is
Rewriting the content to add exact match to keywords that they're close to the first page on but not quite there
Okay, so so that's the output that we got there now what we want to do is
Ask it for what the best target keyword is. Okay, so
Let me grab that prompt

And what we're looking for is this this people also ask section

We end up just getting more and more and more people also ask questions and that's what we really want here
We just want a lot of people also ask questions, you know again without chat gpt's help

paste that in there and then I'm gonna come over to my people also ask

We want to establish more topical authority more topical relevance for this particular keyword
so let's go ahead and
Start thinking about generating an FAQ section that we can add to the existing content and here
We're going to ask chat gpt to first separate
Which questions are directly answered and which ones are not directly answered remember?
We covered before that chat gpt AI in general has a tendency to hallucinate
So we want to focus on
We want to ask chat gpt to answer questions using only the content. We've already provided
That will minimize the probability of hallucinating. So that's what this prompt does. It's basically
you know
Focuses on the questions that are directly answered
So we're going then chat gpt is going to write an FAQ section based on the
Questions that are directly answered in the content. So we still want to double-check this
We still want to make sure that it's not hallucinating. It's not making things up

and if we do write supporting content articles the best supporting content articles to write are

Make sense to expand into its own
Article and then we can use internal linking to establish it as a supporting article for the target page
This wire crate versus plastic kettle and you can see so I asked it to give me a target keyword

And then it's even giving me some headings for the article. So this is going to be super helpful

Obviously, we would use chat gpt to write this article. We're not going to write it by hand

So there we have it that is what we do if we have a piece of content that is ranking
